Full features include product collections, informational pages, and blogs. Full-featured Full-featured Full-featured Full-featured World's best-converting checkout Equip your store with a world-class checkout that lets customers complete purchases with just one click. Unlimited products Sell as many products and services as you want. Additional staff accounts Let staff help you run your store and control who has permission to access info—from product pages to customer data. 5 15 Unlimited Collaborator accounts Give 3rd party designers, developers, and marketing experts limited access to your store. (Does not count toward staff account limits.) Templates and themes Easily create polished storefronts and customer messages with business-ready templates and themes. Sales channels Promote and sell your products everywhere: on social media, in online marketplaces, through customer chat, and more. Inventory locations Track inventory, fulfill orders, and sell products across multiple locations, including retail stores, warehouses, and pop-ups. 10 10 10 200 Shopify Collective Dropship with Shopify's network of trusted brands: discover and source products to sell, or expand your reach by selling through other retailers. Analytics Access 60+ reports to track your store performance or build custom reporting with flexible, real-time analytics. Shopify Academy Access courses and learning paths designed to help you build your business on Shopify. 24/7 support Get round-the-clock access to the Shopify support team. Live chat Live chat Enhanced live chat Priority support by phone or live chat Transaction fees 2% 1% 0.6% 0.2% Tax Platform Calculate accurate taxes on every order based on the most up-to-date tax rules. Additional paid service Additional paid service Additional paid service Additional paid service Hosting and administration Unlimited web hosting Get fast load times and exceptional reliability for your store with unlimited bandwidth and storage. Custom domain Use your own existing domain, purchase one through Shopify, or use a free ".myshopify.com" domain. Free SSL certificate Get a free site security certificate to encrypt your online store's content and publish it securely. Organization settings Manage administrative tasks like staff and billing across multiple Shopify stores. In-person selling Included in-person selling A lightweight solution for selling in person. Accept payments on your mobile device using Tap to Pay for iPhone or Android or a card reader. Shopify POS Pro (per location) Everything included in paid plans, plus faster workflows, more control over staff permissions, and in-depth inventory reporting tools. ₹7,000 INR/mo ₹7,000 INR/mo ₹7,000 INR/mo 20 locations included Marketing Unlimited contacts Add unlimited contacts to your Shopify account. Customer segmentation Filter and group customers to find and reach exactly the right people. Shopify Email Create emails from scratch or from templates, send campaigns, automate emails, and report on results. First 10,000 emails are free each month, with volume discounts on additional emails for higher plans. Shopify Forms Attract, acquire, and convert new customers with our free lead capture solution. Shopify Inbox Convert more customers through chat, including automated messages. Marketing automation Engage customers at every stage of their journey with automated marketing flows. Use pre-made templates or build custom flows that suit your unique business. Abandoned checkout recovery Automatically send emails to customers who leave your store without completing checkout. Discount codes Offer your customers a fixed value, percentage, or shipping discount on products or collections. Gift cards Expand your current customer base and attract new customers by offering gift cards. Shopify Marketplace Connect Connect and list products Connect and list your Shopify products on all supported marketplaces. Import marketplace orders Import unlimited orders from marketplaces to Shopify. First 50 Shopify-synced orders Each month, get 50 marketplace orders from Shopify-synced listings for free. More than 50 Shopify-synced orders Get additional orders from Shopify-synced listings for a 1% transaction fee (up to a total maximum of $99 USD per month). 1% up to $99 USD/mo 1% up to $99 USD/mo 1% up to $99 USD/mo 1% up to $99 USD/mo Customization 3rd party app integrations Manage your unique business with a vast selection of compatible apps. Ecommerce automations Automate manual tasks, build workflows, and grow your business with the first built-in ecommerce automation platform. Custom apps Build apps using Shopify APIs. For added customization, get API access to personally identifiable information (PII), including customer names, addresses, phone numbers, and email. Limited data access (no PII) Full data access Full data access Full data access API rate limits Power your custom or 3rd party apps with flexible integrations. Standard Standard Up to 2x on select APIs Up to 10x on select APIs Headless storefronts Build a custom storefront with Hydrogen, Shopify’s React-based toolkit and deploy on Oxygen, Shopify’s free global hosting solution. 1 1 1 25 International Language translation Enable multiple languages on your storefront to reach a global customer base. Includes two free automated translations and flexible integrations with third-party translation services. Localized selling with custom markets Manage global sales from a single store with Markets. Deliver a customized shopping experience for different countries or regions. Product pricing by market Take greater control of your international pricing strategy by setting specific prices for products or product variants in each market. Local domains Assign custom web addresses for each market that are optimized for local search results. Automatically redirect customers to the right domain or subfolder based on their market. Duties and import taxes Estimate and collect duties and import taxes at checkout to give customers total cost clarity. Local storefronts Tailor your shop’s layout, imagery and messaging for customers in different markets. Shopify Finance Shopify Balance Your all-in-one business account with a daily earnings rate, fast payouts, and no monthly fees.¹ Effortlessly manage your money with up to six free accounts. US only. 2.29% earnings rate 2.29% earnings rate 2.29% earnings rate 3.32% earnings rate Shopify Credit A pay-in-full Visa® card with up to 3% cashback and the option to pay over 10 months for a fee.² US only. Shopify Capital Quick, customized funding to help grow your business, available to eligible merchants. No credit check required—repay as you make sales.³ Available in select countries. Shopify Bill Pay Schedule, pay, and manage business bills from your admin using your preferred payment methods, helping you save time, cut costs, and streamline finances.⁴ US only. Just for Plus Checkout customizations Convert more buyers with advanced customizations to Shopify Checkout using powerful apps and branding tools. High-volume checkout Let more shoppers check out simultaneously during big sales events. B2B on Shopify Use dozens of out-of-the-box wholesale features to sell B2B and DTC from a single store, or set up a separate B2B-only store. Shopify Combined Listings Combine individual products that come in multiple colors, materials, or lengths into a single product listing. Each variation gets its own title, URL and dedicated image carousel, providing a convenient, content-rich buyer experience optimized for conversion. Free expansion stores Set up to nine Expansion Stores under the same brand for the purpose of selling in a different language, currency, wholesale, or retail. 9 Bot protection Protects your online store from bots during flash sales. Exclusive API access and endpoints Build complex integrations with APIs and get up to 500% higher API call limits. Feature test drives Control the release of new features to your stores to ensure your workflows and API integrations keep functioning smoothly. Launchpad Schedule automated promotions, product releases, and online store updates. Custom app built with Shopify Functions Get the freedom to design and deploy flexible personalizations to build commerce experiences as unique as your brand with Shopify Functions. Custom user groups Group users with similar roles together to assign permissions in bulk, making it easy to onboard new team members or transition roles within your organization. Shopify Plus Certified App Partners Use apps that are hand-selected for their quality and ability to solve complex needs. Learn more Join millions of merchants on Shopify START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL START YOUR FREE TRIAL Frequently asked questions General questions What is Shopify and how does it work? Shopify is an all-in-one commerce platform built for independent business owners to start, run, and grow their businesses online, in-store, and everywhere in between. Here are just few things you can do with Shopify: - Create and customize an online store - Sell in multiple places, including web, mobile, social media, and brick-and-mortar - Manage products, inventory, payments, and shipping - Create, execute, and analyze online marketing campaigns How much does Shopify cost? You can try Shopify free for 3 days, no credit card required. After your trial expires, choose a plan that suits the size and stage of your business. How long are your contracts? Most Shopify plans are month to month unless you sign up for a yearly plan. Shopify Plus is available on 1- or 3-year terms. Can I cancel my account at any time? Yes, if you ever decide that Shopify isn't the best ecommerce platform for your business, simply cancel your account. If you choose a 1- or 3-year Shopify Plus subscription, you can cancel when your term commitment expires. Can I change my plan later on? On most Shopify plans, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. If you choose a 1-year Shopify Plus subscription, you can upgrade to a 3-year subscription at any time. For both 1- and 3-year subscriptions to Shopify Plus, you can downgrade when your term commitment expires. Do you offer any discounts? We offer a 25% discount for yearly subscriptions if you choose the Basic, Grow, or Advanced plans. If you choose a 3-year Shopify Plus plan, we offer a monthly discount and lower online variable platform fees. In what countries can I use Shopify? You can use Shopify in nearly every country in the world. Is Shopify PCI Compliant or PCI Certified? Yes, Shopify is certified Level 1 PCI DSS compliant. This means all your data and customer information is ultra secure. Payment questions Are there third-party transaction fees? Third-party transaction fees apply if you use a third-party payment provider: for the Basic plan, for the Grow plan, and for the Advanced plan What is a third-party payment provider? A third-party payment provider (also called a payment processor or payment gateway) allows you to accept payments online. Learn more about supported third-party payment providers. Are there any credit card fees? Shopify charges a small fee to allow you to accept major credit cards, such as Visa and Mastercard, as payment in your store. These fees vary depending on the plan that you choose. Store setup questions Is there a setup fee? No, there are no setup fees on any of our plans. I'm looking to switch to Shopify. How do I get my data over? If you already have an ecommerce website or are using a different ecommerce platform for your business, you can use the Store Importer app to import your products, customers, and orders data to Shopify. Can I use my own domain name with Shopify? Yes, you can purchase a domain name within Shopify, or use an existing one that you own. We also provide a forever free myshopify.com domain name to all stores when they sign up. Do I get free web hosting when I open an online store? Yes, Shopify includes secure, unlimited ecommerce hosting on all plans. You can also use the Buy Button to add ecommerce to any existing website. What are your bandwidth fees? There are none. All Shopify plans include unlimited bandwidth for free. POS What is Shopify POS? Shopify POS is a point of sale app that you can use to sell your products in person. Process orders, accept payments, produce receipts, and control it all from your mobile device. What kinds of businesses use Shopify POS? Shopify's point of sale is flexible enough to support a variety of businesses at any stage of growth. The retailers that find the most value from Shopify POS are those that sell (or want to sell) products both online and in person. Does my online store integrate with Shopify POS? Yes, your Shopify online store automatically synchronizes with Shopify POS, and you manage your entire business from one dashboard. Inventory, product, and payment updates that you make in your Shopify admin will instantly take effect in Shopify POS Everything you need to sell online, all in one place Whether you’re building a website, managing inventory, or responding to customers, you can do it all with Shopify. Enter your email address Start for free Start for free You agree to receive Shopify marketing emails. Shopify Bill Pay is provided by Shopify is a tech company, not a bank. We partner with Stripe Payments Company for money transmission services and account services with funds held at Fifth Third Bank N.A., Member FDIC. Shopify Balance Visa® Commercial cards are powered by Stripe and issued by Celtic Bank pursuant to a license from Visa U.S.A. Inc. All funding through Shopify Capital in the U.S. is issued by WebBank. Shopify Credit Visa® Commercial Credit cards are powered by Stripe and issued by Celtic Bank pursuant to a license from Visa U.S.A. Inc. See Issuing Bank Terms and Program Terms . The Balance earnings rate is a reward provided by Shopify and is not interest. The rate is variable, subject to change without notice, and accurate as of March 23, 2026. The reward accrues daily and is paid monthly in the form of a credit to your Balance account. ACH limits may apply. See Reward Terms . Stores on Shopify Plus are rewarded with 3.32%, and all other plans receive 2.29%. "Cashback" refers to rewards earned as a percentage discount on eligible purchases. Earn 3% cashback as a statement credit on up to US$250,000 of annual eligible purchases in your monthly top spend category—either marketing, fulfillment, or wholesale, and 1% cashback thereafter. Earn 1% cashback on the other two spend categories. Restrictions apply. See Program Terms for details. By default, you are opted in to paying your full statement balance by an automatic debit from your designated bank account within 1 month to avoid fees. You have the option to switch to making daily payments from your sales and take up to 10 months to pay your full statement balance, for a fee. If payment is not received in full within 10 months, a 2% monthly late fee will apply to your past-due balance. Offers to apply do not guarantee funding. Shopify Capital loans are repaid based on a percentage of daily sales. The maximum repayment term is 18 months, and 2 minimum payments apply. The actual time period within which the loan is repaid may be less than 18 months. Funds through Shopify Capital are added to your account in as little as two business days, if approved.
